design_philosophy: Modern brutalist and minimalist aesthetics. Full-width grid layout with bold, thin black borders between sections. Clean white background. Typography uses bold, futuristic sans-serif for headings (Helvetica Neue, Arial Black) and a clean monotone color scheme. No unnecessary elements—just massive images and sharp lines. Site name: AXUM.

typography.headings: Helvetica Neue, Arial Black, system-ui, sans-serif

scale.h1: text-6xl md:text-8xl lg:text-[10vw] font-black uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none
scale.h2: text-4xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black uppercase tracking-tight

layout_and_spacing.grid: Strict full-width modular grid. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 layout logic. Every section and item must be divided by a 1px solid black border (e.g. border-b border-black).
layout_and_spacing.spacing: Generous padding inside bordered containers (p-6 to p-12).
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid #000000 everywhere. border-collapse-like structure. No rounded corners (`rounded-none`).

motion_and_interactions.product_hover: Smooth opacity cross-fade. Dual-image hover effect: top image fades out (opacity-0) to reveal bottom image.
motion_and_interactions.hero_slider: Horizontal slide transition (current pushes previous out instantly but smoothly), with subtle zoom-in (Ken Burns effect) on the active image. Page transitions and swiping must feel liquid and seamless.
motion_and_interactions.lookbook_fade: Fade-in-out effect when page scrolls or category tabs are switched.
motion_and_interactions.button_hover: Instant inverted color animation (black bg -> white bg, text-white -> text-black, border-black).
motion_and_interactions.nav_overlay: Smoothly slides in from the right side of the screen when clicked.

components.buttons: Sharp rectangular boxes, bold text, solid black default, white text. Hover state must invert instantly.
components.product_card: Large image cards spanning grid cells. Image area aspect-[3/4]. Minimal text footer with Name and Price, separated by borders.
components.hero_slider: Full screen (h-screen). Absolute positioning for text and controls. Smooth horizontal slide tracking.
components.lookbook: Category tabs as border-separated links. Dynamic image display.
components.newsletter: Brutalist input form: full-width input, huge text, simple submit arrow/button, thick black borders.
components.editorial_strip: Horizontal strip section for about info with stark brutalist layout.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion or Swiper.js to handle the hero slider with exact bezier transitions (`cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94)`) and sliding horizontal effect.
Implement the ken burns zoom via CSS transform/scale on the active slide.
The product grid hover effect MUST be built with two images positioned absolutely. The top image fades out on hover with the specified timing function and duration (0.4s).
Borders are essential for the brutalist style. Use tailwind `border-black` and `border` or specific side borders (`border-r`, `border-b`) on grid items.
All text inputs and forms should have heavy 1px black borders and zero border radius.
Ensure the `data-testid` attribute is on all interactive elements as requested.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
